checklist.entry: Use the Responses API as the default modern interface for model generation unless another OpenAI API is explicitly required.
Treat input as text, image or file content according to documented input types.
Use instructions for system or developer guidance where supported.
Use previous response or conversation state deliberately; do not assume state is preserved unless the implementation passes or stores it explicitly.
Use streaming only when the product needs incremental output and the client handles stream failure, retries and partial output.
Record the model, endpoint, input shape, output mode, tool configuration and validation path.
Do not expose raw hidden reasoning, secrets, API keys or sensitive input data in logs.
When using include fields, document the additional response data requested and why it is needed.
